Off Calendar Jun-18-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Mark J. Sarni, Assistant General Counsel., Marcus & Millichap (650) 494-8900 for Defendant and Moving Party Marcus & Millichap Real Estate Investment
R. Boyd McSparran, Esq., Goldstein Gellman Melbostad Gibson & Harris LLP (415) 673-5600 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Taylor
RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANT MARCUS &. MILLICHAP REAL ESTATE INVESTMENT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:
1st and 2nd Causes of Action OVERRULED with 10 days leave to answer;
3rd and 4th Causes of Action SUSTAINED with 10 days leave to allege relevant written and oral contract relationship as to Marcus & Millichap. Notice is waived. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/MWF-X) Reporter: Patty Van Steenberge, CSR #1742
